meaning: adj.无人的,无人居住的,失掉男子气概的,被阉割的
examples: A rescue plan could be achieved by sending an unmanned module to the space station.
Elon Musk's Space X aims to send an unmanned aircraft to Mars by 2018.
Unmanned post offices meant millions of letters went unsorted.
The FAA strictly regulates who, where, when and why unmanned air craft will be flown.
There have been reports of domestic federal agencies using unmanned drones to monitor us from above.
